prompt: A cinematic tech-themed YouTube thumbnail for a Chinese AI tutorial video. Dark GitHub-style background: deep gradient from #0d1117 to #1c2333. Left side: a glowing 3D lobster mascot (cartoon style, orange-red color) holding a glowing API key card, surrounded by floating token coins labeled 'TOKEN'. Center: bold Chinese text '免费获取大模型API' in gradient blue (#58a6ff to #79c0ff), font-weight 900, with subtle glow effect. Below: highlighted badge showing '9000万 tokens 免费额度' in bright green (#3fb950). Right side: stacked platform logos (智谱AI, 硅基流动, 百度千帆) with checkmarks. Background decorations: soft bokeh light orbs in blue and orange, subtle code snippets fading into background. Bottom strip: '普通人也能用好OpenClaw · 第2篇' in small white text. Overall mood: professional, exciting, trustworthy. 16:9 aspect ratio, 1920x1080px.
